author: hangleang
content: Thanks for taking time to investigate on this issue. Is it the same reason for `process_pending_deposits`?

author: hangleang
content:

author: jtraglia
content: Looks like it's the same reason. Look at the test case [here](https://ethspec.tools/#tests/v1.7.0-alpha.8/mainnet/gloas/epoch_processing/pending_deposits/pyspec_tests/process_pending_deposits_withdrawable_validator_not_churned). We avoid calling `run_epoch_processing_with` so it doesn't alter the balances. We cannot guarantee these exist. Consider the `pre_epoch` and `post_epoch` files to be optional extras. <@1019999229151821936> we need to update [this section](https://github.com/jtraglia/consensus-specs/tree/1a00410087d31b5c975e9faf75579bd4b99d879d/tests/formats/epoch_processing#condition-alternative) in the test format to make it clear these files are optional. Also, please fix the incorrect names (`pre_full` -> `pre_epoch` and `post_full` -> `post_epoch`).

author: hangleang
content: Okay, then we will have to handle it case by case

author: hangleang
content: I need to update my PR, thank you for confirm
